mechanism_narrative: When the federal funds rate is low or declining, the discount rate applied to equity cash flows falls and liquidity conditions improve, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if lower or falling FEDFUNDS does not produce higher 20-day forward S&P 500 returns than rising FEDFUNDS in walk-forward tests, or if Rank IC is below 0.03 over rolling 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: A very high unemployment rate signals impaired household income and weak earnings expectations, so when UNRATE crosses above recessionary levels the S&P 500 earns negative forward returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations with UNRATE above 9.5% have positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of cases or average returns are not below the unconditional mean.

mechanism_narrative: When retail sales growth turns positive while unemployment remains elevated, the data signal household demand stabilization despite labor stress, causing upward revisions to near-term earnings and positive S&P 500 returns.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE > 8% and RSAFS 3-month growth crosses above 0%
evidence_refs: fact:RSAFS latest value is 352985.0 and UNRATE latest value is 10.0
failure_condition: Reject if the joint condition does not outperform cases with high UNRATE and negative RSAFS growth, or if average 20-day forward returns after the trigger are not positive.

mechanism_narrative: A turn upward in industrial production after weakness signals an inventory and manufacturing rebound that raises cyclical earnings expectations, producing positive S&P 500 returns over the following 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO 3-month change crosses above 0% after being negative
failure_condition: Reject if INDPRO recovery triggers are followed by non-positive average 60-day S&P 500 returns or if the signal's hit rate is below 50% in walk-forward validation.

mechanism_narrative: Housing starts below severe contraction thresholds indicate weak construction activity, impaired credit creation, and negative wealth effects, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if HOUST below 600 is followed by positive 60-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of triggered cases or if triggered returns exceed unconditional returns.

mechanism_narrative: At the zero lower bound, a positive turn in CPI while FEDFUNDS remains pinned near zero signals reflation without immediate policy tightening, improving nominal revenue expectations and lifting equities over 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS <= 0.25% and CPIAUCSL 3-month annualized change crosses above 0%
evidence_refs: fact:CPIAUCSL latest value is 217.541 and FEDFUNDS latest value is 0.12
failure_condition: Reject if the CPI reflation plus low FEDFUNDS condition produces non-positive average 5-day S&P 500 returns or underperforms CPI upturns outside the zero-lower-bound regime.

mechanism_narrative: When payroll employment stops contracting while unemployment is still high, equity markets price the inflection in labor income before the unemployment rate falls, generating positive S&P 500 returns over 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE > 8% and PAYEMS 3-month change crosses above 0
evidence_refs: fact:PAYEMS latest value is 130910.0 and UNRATE latest value is 10.0
failure_condition: Reject if the PAYEMS inflection with high UNRATE is not followed by positive average 20-day returns or if it fails to outperform high-UNRATE periods without PAYEMS improvement.

mechanism_narrative: When stale real GDP remains depressed but monthly retail sales and industrial production improve together, markets infer that quarterly growth will be revised upward, producing positive S&P 500 returns over 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: GDPC1 year-over-year growth < 0% and both RSAFS and INDPRO 3-month growth cross above 0%
failure_condition: Reject if the joint monthly improvement signal during negative GDPC1 growth does not generate positive average 60-day returns or if its Rank IC is below 0.03 over rolling 3-year windows.
